description_long: This object is a stylized black bird with a large, thick, and slightly curved beak that dominates its head. The wings are outstretched and feature broad, rounded feathers, while the tail is short and appears slightly forked. The body is compact and rounded, with a smooth transition from the head to the torso. The legs are thin and end in sharp talons, giving the bird a predatory appearance. The overall surface is matte and uniform in color, with subtle shading to indicate feathered regions.
description: A stylized black bird with a large curved beak, outstretched wings, and sharp talons, featuring a matte, uniform surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad wings fully extended, large curved beak, and talons visible beneath the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pronounced curvature and thickness of the beak, as well as the layered wing and tail feathers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical spread of the wings and the short, slightly forked tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the beak's length and the overlapping feather structure of the wings and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid black with subtle shading on wings and body
